name: edge-ai
description: Production-ready Infrastructure as Code, applications, pluggable components, and PlatformOps toolchains that empower organizations to achieve more with cloud and edge AI-powered solutions. Built by friendly geeks, for every team that needs edge solutions to achieve real production results.

name: agent-framework
description: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

name: power-platform-skills
description: A plugin marketplace for Claude Code/GitHub Copilot that provides Power Platform development plugins, including reusable skills, agents, and commands for building and deploying solutions.

name: copilot-for-eclipse
description: GitHub Copilot plugin for Eclipse IDE

name: presidio
description: An open-source framework for detecting, redacting, masking, and anonymizing sensitive data (PII) across text, images, and structured data. Supports NLP, pattern matching, and customizable pipelines.

name: generative-ai-for-beginners
description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

name: markitdown
description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

name: qlib
description: Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

name: Reporting-Services
description: Git repo for SQL Server Reporting Services and Power BI paginated report samples, and community projects
